zh.lifeSummary: 當Rey Felipe III de Navarra於1306年3月27日出生在法國豪-諾門迪艾艾福時，他的父親Louis d'Evreux30歲，母親Marguerite d'Artois21歲。他於1329年10月9日與Reina Juana II de Navarra在法國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1343年9月16日在西班牙安達盧希亞卡迪斯潔雷 德 拉 福洛史特拉享年37歲，埋葬在西班牙納法洛亞易盧納。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rey Felipe III de Navarra于1306年3月27日出生在法国豪-諾門迪艾艾福时，他的父亲Louis d'Evreux30岁，母亲Marguerite d'Artois21岁。他于1329年10月9日与Reina Juana II de Navarra在法国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1343年9月16日在西班牙安達盧希亞卡迪斯潔雷 德 拉 福洛史特拉享年37岁，埋葬在西班牙納法洛亞易盧納。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Navarra
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Sal, Edgardo, Guido, Santo, Vito, Angelo, Annamarie, Antonio, Benedicto, Camillo, Dante, Emilio, Fausto, Gaetano, Giuseppe, Mario, Romulo, Sergio.  Spanish Agustin, Herlinda, Manuel, Solita.

Spanish, Portuguese, Italian, and Jewish (Sephardic): habitational name from Navarre (Castilian Navarra, Basque Nafarroa, French Navarre), a largely Basque-speaking region now divided between Spain and France, but in the Middle Ages an independent Basque kingdom. The name of the region derives from Basque naba ‘plain next to mountains’. Compare Navarre .

variants.name: Navarrete
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Manuel, Carlos, Jesus, Pedro, Raul, Luis, Miguel, Roberto, Salvador, Francisco.

Spanish: habitational name from any of the places in La Rioja, Aragon, and the Basque Country named in Castilian Navarrete and in Basque Nafarrate (the latter in Araba/Álava province), of Basque origin (compare   Navarra   and   Nafarrate  ).
Basque: Castilianized form of Nafarrate or Nafarrete, cognates of 1.

variants.name: Navarro
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Manuel, Carlos, Jesus, Luis, Ramon, Francisco, Miguel, Rafael, Jorge, Pedro.
Spanish, Italian, and Jewish (Sephardic): habitational name for someone from Navarre (see   Navarra  ).

variants.name: Nava
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Jesus, Carlos, Luis, Pedro, Manuel, Alfredo, Francisco, Ruben, Javier, Enrique.

Spanish, Catalan, and Asturian-Leonese: habitational name from any of numerous places called Nava, named with nava ‘treeless plateau’, a word of pre-Roman origin, most probably from Basque naba ‘plain next to mountains’ (see Navarra ).

variants.name: Navarre
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Jacques, Anatole, Angelle, Camille, Marcelle.
French: habitational name from Navarre (see   Navarra  ).

nameMeanings.name: Felipe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Greek. See Philip .

variants.name: Philip
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Rey Felipe III de Navarra was born on 27 March 1306, in Évreux, Eure, Upper Normandy, France, his father, Louis d'Evreux, was 30 and his mother, Marguerite d'Artois, was 21. He married Reina Juana II de Navarra on 9 October 1329, in France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 16 September 1343, in Jerez de la Frontera, Cádiz, Andalusia, Spain, at the age of 37, and was buried in Iruña, Nafarroa, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rey Felipe III de Navarra est né le 27 mars 1306, à Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Louis d'Evreux, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Marguerite d'Artois, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Reina Juana II de Navarra le 9 octobre 1329, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 16 septembre 1343, à Jerez de la Frontera, Cádiz, Andalucía, Espagne, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterré à Iruña, Nafarroa, Espagne.

de.Jerez de la Frontera, Jerez de la Fronte: Jerez de la Frontera, Cádiz, Andalucía, Spanien
de.lifeSummary: Als Rey Felipe III de Navarra am 27. März 1306 in Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Louis d'Evreux 30 und seine Mutter Marguerite d'Artois 21. Er hat am 9. Oktober 1329 in Frankreich Reina Juana II de Navarra geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 16. September 1343 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Jerez de la Frontera, Cádiz, Andalucía, Spanien und wurde in Iruña, Nafarroa, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rey Felipe III de Navarra è nato il il 27 marzo 1306 nel Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Louis d'Evreux, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Marguerite d'Artois, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Reina Juana II de Navarra il 9 ottobre 1329, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 16 settembre 1343, nel Jerez de la Frontera, Cádiz, Andalucía, Spagna, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolto a Iruña, Nafarroa, Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Rey Felipe III de Navarraが1306年3月27日にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアevレウックスで生まれた時，父Louis d'Evreuxは30歳，母Marguerite d'Artoisは21歳であった。1329年10月9日にフランスでReina Juana II de Navarraと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1343年9月16日にスペインアンダルクiアクaディズジャーエズ ド ラ フロンテラで37歳で死去し，スペインナファロアイルnアにて埋葬された。

ko.Jerez de la Frontera, Jerez de la Fronte: 스페인 앤다루ci아 ca디즈 제레즈 데 라 프론터아
ko.lifeSummary: Rey Felipe III de Navarra(이)가 1306년 3월 27일 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 e브레우스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Louis d'Evreux(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Marguerite d'Artois(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1329년 10월 9일 프랑스에서 Reina Juana II de Navarra(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1343년 9월 16일 스페인 앤다루ci아 ca디즈 제레즈 데 라 프론터아에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 나파로 이루n아에 묻혔다.

pt.Jerez de la Frontera, Jerez de la Fronte: Jerez de la Frontera, Cádiz, Andaluzia, Espanha
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rey Felipe III de Navarra nasceu em 27 de março de 1306, em Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Louis d'Evreux, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite d'Artois, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Reina Juana II de Navarra em 9 de outubro de 1329, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 16 de setembro de 1343, em Jerez de la Frontera, Cádiz, Andaluzia, Espanha, com 37 anos, e foi sepultado em Iruña, Nafarroa, Espanha.

ru.Jerez de la Frontera, Jerez de la Fronte: джирез де ла фронтира, кaдиз, андалукiа, Испания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rey Felipe III de Navarra родился 27 марта 1306 г. в местности eвреукс, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Louis d'Evreux было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Marguerite d'Artois, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Reina Juana II de Navarra 9 октября 1329 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 16 сентября 1343 г. в местности джирез де ла фронтира, кaдиз, андалукiа, Испания в возрасте 37 лет и был похоронен в местности ируnа, нафарроа, Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rey Felipe III de Navarra nació el 27 de marzo de 1306, en Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Louis d'Evreux, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Marguerite d'Artois, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Reina Juana II de Navarra el 9 de octubre de 1329, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 16 de septiembre de 1343, en Jerez de la Frontera, Cádiz, Andalucía, España, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultado en Pamplona, Navarra, España.
